title: Explore Project Architecture
description: Research-based exploration of poly project: inventory modules, understand data flow, document components, identify tech stack patterns for Polymarket insider detection ML pipeline

title: Analyze core pipeline modules (collection, api, intelligence)
description: Inventory and document the main modules in src/poly/: collection (analyzer.py, collector.py), api (polygonscan.py, polymarket.py, polygon_rpc.py), intelligence (analyzer.py, scout.py, scorer.py, clustering.py). Understand their responsibilities, interfaces, and how they interact.

title: Analyze data layer and processing pipeline
description: Examine data/ directory structure (raw/, processed/, features/, markets/, traders/, experiments/) and understand data flow from collection through processing to feature extraction. Document data schemas and transformations.

title: Analyze utility modules and CLI interface
description: Review utils/ (logging.py), cli.py, main.py, investigate.py to understand entry points, configuration, logging setup, and CLI commands available for the pipeline.

title: Synthesize architecture findings
description: Consolidate findings from all research subtasks into a comprehensive architecture document. Include: module diagram, data flow diagram, tech stack breakdown, key design patterns, and potential improvement areas.
